company_type: Clinical Research Services and Healthcare Intelligence

supply_chain.dependencies: The Company depends on third parties for data and support services including third-party transportation providers, suppliers of drugs for patients participating in clinical trials, suppliers of kits for use in clinical trial laboratories business, suppliers of reagents for use in testing equipment and providers of maintenance contracts for equipment
supply_chain.risks: Suppliers may restrict use of data, increase restrictions on data use, increase prices, refuse to license data, fail to adhere to quality control standards, or fail to deliver data. Failure of third-party support service providers (transportation, drug suppliers, kit suppliers, reagent suppliers, equipment maintenance) could materially adversely affect business

regulatory_risks: Good Clinical Practice (GCP) regulations and guidelines - FDA, EMA, Japan's Ministry of Health, Labor and Welfare requirements for clinical trials
Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act (FDC Act) and Public Health Service Act (PHS Act) compliance
HIPAA (Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act) requirements for protected health information
EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
Data protection and privacy laws in over 100 countries
Clinical Laboratory Improvement Amendments (CLIA) requirements
DEA (Drug Enforcement Administration) regulations for controlled substances
Prescription Drug Marketing Act licensing and requirements
FDA regulations against off-label promotion
Federal Trade Commission Act and state consumer protection laws
Medicare and federal healthcare program regulations
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) compliance
UK Bribery Act compliance
International anti-corruption laws in multiple jurisdictions
EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
EU Taxonomy regulations
EU Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence Directive
OECD Pillar Two global corporate minimum tax rate of 15%
EU Artificial Intelligence Act
Colorado AI Act
New regulatory requirements for biopharmaceutical industry
Inflation Reduction Act (US) - drug pricing negotiations, Medicare rebates
Changes to Medicaid program and federal 340B drug pricing program
State laws restricting biopharmaceutical sales and marketing practices
Immigration laws affecting temporary and permanent workers
Environmental regulations (EPA, Nuclear Regulatory Commission, Department of Transportation)
Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA) requirements
International Air Transport Association regulations for specimen transportation

sanction_risks: Economic sanctions imposed by US or foreign countries could adversely affect ability to conduct business
Unfavorable labor regulations, tax policies, trade barriers, or economic sanctions could have adverse effect on operations
Ongoing conflict between Russia and Ukraine may cause supply chain disruptions, endanger personnel, and cause project delays
State-sponsored cyberattacks related to geopolitical events (Russia-Ukraine conflict) may disrupt operations
